happy.message: The numbers we crunched, the models we broke, the coffee at 11pm trying to figure out why the pipeline failed again — those are the moments I'll treasure!

sad.message: Honestly, who's going to debug the pipeline at midnight with me now? I'll miss you more than this message can say.

miserable.message: Rough day? Remember every model that failed before it worked. This is just another iteration — you'll come out the other side.
